name: Were Garurumon

signature_move.name: Kaiser Nail
signature_move.description: 12Cuts the opponent to pieces with the sharp claws on both of its hands.Shoots energy blades by slashing with its claws.

description: A Beast Man Digimon that evolved from Garurumon and gained the ability to walk on two legs. Its speed dropped as a result of turning bipedal, but it became a Commando Type Digimon with stronger offensive and defensive power, as well as developed a tactical nature. Its kicking techniques, which it unleashes using the leg strength it retained from when it was a Garurumon, are quite strong, and its jumping ability contends for first or second place among Digimon. Also, it is fiercely loyal and has a reliable nature, faithfully executing any task ordered by its master. Its Special Move is cutting the opponent to pieces with the sharp claws on both of its hands ( Kaiser Nail ).
